description: Set saved defaults for type-aware commands. set <type> [category] applies to all; set <type> [category] <command> applies only to that command.
Set the global defaults to core + full_response.
Set the global defaults to stress + category_prediction.
Set the frozen_benchmark default to stress_v2 + category_prediction.
Alias for set with the same arguments.
Run native model training using the saved train defaults when no type or category is provided.
Run the core full-response training configuration.
Run the core category-prediction training configuration.
Run the stress category-prediction training configuration.
Run the currently saved train selection with an epoch override of 8.
Run core full_response with an epoch override of 8.
Evaluate a saved native model against the saved active benchmark selection when no type or category is provided.
Evaluate against data/processed/benchmark_full_response_sft.jsonl.
Evaluate against data/processed/benchmark_category_prediction_sft.jsonl.
Evaluate against data/processed/benchmark_stress_v2_native_sft.jsonl.
Evaluate the current training model against the resolved frozen regression benchmark selection.
Resolve the frozen regression benchmark relative to the current core selection.
Generate teacher data, prepare the dataset, and rebuild SFT files in one command.
Generate 200 records with generation batch size 25, then prepare and convert the dataset.
Run only the Codex improvement pass against the latest completed run for the saved improve selection, or an explicitly named trainable selection.
Run the standalone Codex improvement pass against the latest stress category-prediction run.
Evaluate a saved native model directly with the default evaluator settings.
Watch live native training status.
Refresh and open the training run summary CSV.
Run the automated train -> benchmark -> Codex improvement loop for the saved or explicit training selection.
Run at most 3 automation iterations on the saved autotrain selection.
Run the automation loop for core full_response.
Run at most 3 automation iterations for stress category_prediction.
Repo-local command to show or set saved selection defaults globally or per command.
Repo-local training wrapper. Uses the saved train selection when no type or category is provided.
Repo-local benchmark wrapper for the active benchmark selection.
Repo-local frozen regression benchmark wrapper.
Main automation loop and standalone improve entrypoint.
Show current type/category defaults. With no argument, shows global and per-command defaults.
Show the current default selection for benchmark only.
Repo-local command to show global or per-command default selection settings.
